sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64230" key="lusi/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῡσῐ´-φρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n64230.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">releasing from care,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4105.tlg001:47:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacreont.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
